# Kimi K3 Research Library

Source-first map for Kimi K3 official materials, papers, API docs, tutorials, reviews, videos, images, and community discussion.

Status:
- Official Kimi K3 launch: 2026-07-16.
- Core official facts: 2.8T parameters, Kimi Delta Attention, Attention Residuals, native vision, 1M-token context.
- Technical report: pending official release in this scan.
- Full weights: scheduled by official materials for 2026-07-27; pending verification.
- Official GitHub/Hugging Face Kimi-K3 weight repo: not found in this scan.

Primary official sources:
- Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence: https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3
- Moonshot AI homepage Kimi K3 research entry: https://www.moonshot.cn/
- Getting started with Kimi: https://www.kimi.com/help/getting-started/agentic-chat
- Kimi Agent overview: https://www.kimi.com/help/agent/agent-overview
- How to choose Kimi models and modes: https://www.kimi.com/help/others/model-mode-selection
- Kimi Websites overview: https://www.kimi.com/help/websites/websites-overview
- Kimi API Platform homepage: https://platform.kimi.ai/
- Kimi API Quickstart: https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/overview
- Kimi K3 API guide: https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/guide/kimi-k3-quickstart
- Flagship Model Kimi K3 Pricing: https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/pricing/chat-k3
- Kimi Code model configuration: https://www.kimi.com/code/docs/en/kimi-code/models.html
- Kimi Code What’s New: https://www.kimi.com/code/docs/en/kimi-code/whats-new.html

Primary paper and architecture sources:
- Kimi Linear: An Expressive, Efficient Attention Architecture: https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26692
- Attention Residuals: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15031
- MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals
- MoonshotAI/FlashKDA: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/FlashKDA
- Hugging Face Kimi Linear collection: https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/collections

Independent Kimi3.org companion pages:
- Home: https://kimi3.org/
- Docs: https://kimi3.org/docs/
- Context window: https://kimi3.org/context-window/
- API cost calculator: https://kimi3.org/api-cost-calculator/
- Pricing: https://kimi3.org/pricing/
- Local deployment: https://kimi3.org/local-deployment/
- Run locally: https://kimi3.org/run-locally/
- Hardware requirements: https://kimi3.org/hardware-requirements/
- Benchmarks: https://kimi3.org/benchmarks/
- Open source and open-weight status: https://kimi3.org/open-source/
- Features: https://kimi3.org/features/
- Tools: https://kimi3.org/tools/
- Use cases: https://kimi3.org/use-cases/
- Code workflows: https://kimi3.org/code/
- Review: https://kimi3.org/review/
- Alternatives: https://kimi3.org/alternatives/
- Kimi K3 vs GLM 5.2: https://kimi3.org/vs/glm-5-2/
- Blog: https://kimi3.org/blog/

Data ledger:
- data/kimi-k3-sources.json
